title: Don't just aim for Frontier Labs
summary: Don't just aim for Frontier Labs
whyItMatters: Why AI safety should live wherever AI is deployed, not just where it is built. I spotted a request for feedback on whether someone with AI safety experience should take a for-profit company and "get their hands dirty" as an AI transformation leader, pivoting away from a strategy focused on AI research labs.
